barb.title: Frenzy Barbarian
points: Massive single-target physical DPS with dual-wield attacks
Battle Orders provides +life and +mana to both players
Natural tank with high life, defense, and life leech
Howl scatters trash mobs, letting Zon focus fire
Boss killer — Frenzy shreds act bosses and superuniques

zon.title: Java Amazon
points: Lightning Fury melts entire screens of monsters instantly
Charged Strike has highest single-target DPS in the game
Covers Lightning Immune gaps with physical jab damage
Valkyrie and Decoy provide additional tanking/distraction
Crowd control queen — clears density the Barb can't reach

necro.title: Manfred the Necromancer
points: Army of skeletons and revives provides a wall of meat shields that absorb damage for the whole party
Corpse Explosion chains off initial kills to obliterate entire screens — scales with monster HP in multiplayer
Amplify Damage and Decrepify curses shred physical resistance and cripple dangerous bosses
Lower Resist curse reduces enemy lightning resistance, dramatically boosting the Javazon's Lightning Fury and Charged Strike damage
Safe backline playstyle — the necro directs minions and casts curses from a distance, rarely in harm's way

combined.summary: Battle Orders buffs both characters' survivability. The Barb tanks and kills bosses while the Zon devastates crowds. Together they cover physical and lightning damage types, only struggling against rare Physical + Lightning Immune combos.

combined_affair.summary: Lower Resist + Infinity Conviction obliterates lightning resistance, turning Lightning Fury into a nuke. The skeleton army creates endless corpses for Corpse Explosion chains while the Zon fires from safety. Curses amplify everything — nothing survives the storm of bones and lightning.
